videos.headline: Kyle Monangai rips off 46-yard run, then scores first TD for Rutgers
videos.description: Kyle Monangai bursts through for a 46-yard run, then follows it up with a 3-yard rush to score the opening TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Kyle Monangai rips off 46-yard run, then scores first TD for Rutgers) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: KJ Duff snares the tipped pass for a 6-yard Rutgers TD
videos.description: Athan Kaliakmanis' pass is tipped by a defender and ends up in KJ Duff's hands for a 6-yard touchdown to extend Rutgers' lead over Akron.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (KJ Duff snares the tipped pass for a 6-yard Rutgers TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kyle Monangai powers through for his second Rutgers TD
videos.description: Kyle Monangai barrels into the end zone again for his second touchdown of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Kyle Monangai powers through for his second Rutgers TD) 2024/09/07 ESHEET

videos.headline: Adrian Norton hauls in 32-yard TD for Akron's first score
videos.description: Ben Finley connects with Adrian Norton for a 32-yard touchdown as Akron cuts into the deficit against Rutgers.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play ( Adrian Norton hauls in 32-yard TD for Akron's first score) 2024/09/07 ESHEET
